text: In the eyes of prostitutes, there are no women who don't sell. The only thing they can understand about a rumor that a woman doesn't sell is the price. In fact, when I started my business in 2008, I sent a beauty reporter to Xinjing. Some friends know that I sent a beauty reporter to interview me. It seems that I was supposed to send a tofu block. Maybe I was thinking about a certain topic. For example, Sister Furong's brother is running an education institution. Although it is not a big news, it can be regarded as a news. I was asked to interview her. At that time, I was playing with the reporter. I remember that I played the cow for four hours. Two hours ago, I was still nervous because the colleagues in the office were there. I was nervous when I was playing the cow. You can understand because they have heard it at least 400 times. It's like when I play the cow, I can't play it when my wife is around. Because she has heard it more than 1,000 times. At that time, I played the cow for two hours. Then we all got off work and played the cow until 6 o'clock. After two hours, I broke the tie. I was completely nervous. I played the cow for two hours. I followed the company's philosophy. I saw that the eyes of the company were full of small things. Finally, I was touched. You know that kind of situation will bring you in. You wanted to touch others, but you were touched when you played the cow. At that time, I chatted with the reporter. I said that our organization came to the world. From head to toe, every pore has no blood. The next result is that the final report came out. It became a whole two versions of the article. It brought some interesting things. I called some old guys in the training industry. I said, "I don't know who invested in you, but your financial power is so strong." You are so rich to send two versions of soft materials in newspapers like New Beijing. How much did you spend? I said I didn't spend money. I told him some of my thoughts. I sent two versions of the article. He said, "Xiao Luo, you are not good at this." "We are all in the same circle. You don't need to do this to me." "You hurt my brother's heart." This may be a burden that our market does not arrange. I told him that I didn't spend money to buy soft materials. He didn't believe me. He said that I hurt his feelings. In the end, I realized that in the eyes of prostitutes, there are no women who don't sell. The upper limit that they can understand when they hear rumors that women don't sell is that the price is not enough. This is the upper limit that they can understand when they don't sell. In the end, I was very disappointed. I asked him how much money he spent before. He told me a number. I said it was about the same. He said that he was comforted by the hurt feelings. He said that was right.
